untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires multi-bar shape analysis (identifying two distinct bottoms of similar morphology, measuring separation in weeks, detecting peak between them, and validating volume differential across bars). The allowed indicators cannot express: (1) sequential bottom identification across 3-8 week windows, (2) shape similarity comparison between two separate price structures, (3) temporal separation validation in weeks, (4) relative volume comparison between left vs right bottom. These require custom pattern detection logic unavailable in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Partial translation provided: Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper as confirmation breakout) and volume ratio (hvol_20 as volume trend proxy) to approximate entry, but true Double Bottom pattern detection requires bar-by-bar morphological analysis and multi-timeframe structure validation. Signal requires custom candlestick pattern recognition engine.
